statement.markdown: Given the root of a Trie, implement a function to remove a word from the Trie. If the word is not present, return false. Otherwise, return true. Consider that multiple words may share some prefix.
statement.inputFormat: The first line of the input will contain the root of the Trie, represented as a string. The second line will contain the word to be deleted.
statement.outputFormat: A boolean value indicating whether the word was deleted successfully.
statement.notes: This function should not delete any words that have suffixes with existing words.

examples.explanation: The word "apple" exists in the Trie, so it should be deleted.
The word "banana" does not exist in the Trie, so it should not be deleted.
The word "app" exists in the Trie as a prefix to the word "apple", so it should be deleted.

hints.text: Note the edge case where the word to be deleted has suffixes with existing words.

starterCode.python:
